results.name: Mode-first navigation and settings gear load
Idle contributor screen uses the ready status vocabulary
Task review preserves explicit consent and empty queue safety
Help keeps the safety boundary available in-app
Compose form keeps values and inline submit error across polling
Activity lenses and split settings render
One shared task route renders live-watch details
Provider sign-in failure remains a page recovery state
GitHub device code is selectable and copyable
Contribute controls never start a task without review
Active contribution polling preserves text selection
Session expiry stops polling and offers reconnect
No console errors on any Federation view
